transcript: Speaker A: She was driving skateboard and she fall. Speaker B: Nahi, isko bolenge - The girl lost balance at high speed causing her to fall face-first when the skateboard slipped. [No, we will say this - The girl lost balance at high speed causing her to fall face-first when the skateboard slipped.] Speaker A: Mujhe bhi aise English seekhni hai, lekin mere paas zyada paise aur time nahi hai. [I also want to learn English like this, but I don't have much money or time.] Speaker B: MySivi try karo. Roz 10 minute mere saath English practice karo aur aap ek mahine mein achhi English bolne lagoge. Ye sadharan classes se 7x cheaper bhi hai aur sirf ₹3 mein shuru kar sakte ho. [Try MySivi. Practice English with me for 10 minutes daily and you will start speaking good English in a month. It is also 7x cheaper than regular classes and you can start for just ₹3.] Speaker A: Ismein teacher kaun hoga? [Who will be the teacher in this?] Speaker B: Mere jaise AI teachers step-by-step English speaking sikhayenge. 50 lakh se zyada users MySivi mein practice karte hain. Aap bhi kar lo. [AI teachers like me will teach step-by-step English speaking. More than 50 lakh users practice on MySivi. You should too.] Speaker C: Click now pe install karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Describe this scene in English. She was driving skateboard and she fall. Nahi isko bolenge - The girl lost balance at high speed causing her to fall face-first when the skateboard slipped. Mujhe bhi aise English seekhni hai lekin mere paas zyada paise aur time nahi hai. MySivi try karo. Roz 10 minute mere saath English practice karo aur aap ek mahine mein achhi English bolne lagoge. Ye sadharan classes se 7X CHEAPER bhi hai. ₹3 Only. Ismein teacher kaun hoga? Mere jaise AI teachers step-by-step English speaking sikhayenge. 50 lakh se zyada users My Sivi mein practice karte hain. Aap bhi kar lo. MySivi English speaking app. Install Now.
summary: The ad begins with a man attempting to describe a skateboarding accident in English, only to be corrected by an AI avatar. The avatar introduces MySivi as a fast, budget-friendly app for daily English practice with AI tutors. It concludes with a call to action to download the app.
